title: Welcome to the warren
body: Every worker is a creature, and food is the power grid. Right-drag or WASD to look around; scroll to zoom.

title: Read the Food Grid
body: Top-left: Production vs Upkeep. When the stockpile empties, everyone slows to a crawl. Keep the net positive.

title: Assign the crew
body: Miners dig ore, Carriers feed the kitchen, Cooks make stew, Guards fight. Use – and + in the Jobs panel to reassign a goblin.

title: Weather the famine
body: The first famine hits around minute five. Shift Miners into Carriers before the meter empties — hungry workers slow the whole warren.

title: Grow the grid
body: Banked ore builds new farms and pots. Open Build & Dig, pick a Farm, and click open floor near your Cook Pot — shorter hauls, faster stew.

title: Secure the warren
body: Deliver 50 ore and hold a 100-food surplus to win. Beyond that: charcoal, living furnaces, raids — and something vast sleeping below.
